mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM poems
id NOT IN
#{id}
ORDER BY id LIMIT #{offset}, 1
SELECT id, title, dynasty, author, content, annotation, appreciation, translation, tags, source, source_url, created_at, updated_at FROM poems ORDER BY id LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO poems (id, title, dynasty, author, content, annotation, appreciation, translation, tags, source, source_url, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{dynasty}, #{author}, #{content}, #{annotation}, #{appreciation}, #{translation}, #{tags}, #{source}, #{sourceUrl}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE poems SET annotation = #{annotation}, appreciation = #{appreciation}, translation = #{translation}, tags = #{tags}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT dynasty, COUNT(*) as count FROM poems GROUP BY dynasty ORDER BY count DESC
